isometric_harbor_dock_canvas: The image shows an isometric harbor with a shoreline, blue water tiles, a connected wooden main dock, dock posts, cargo objects, and small boats.
The scene shows a pixel-art isometric harbor where boats are moored beside a main dock that extends from land into the water.
The picture shows an isometric dockyard with shoreline tiles, water tiles, a wooden pier, dock objects, and boats tied along the dock.
The canvas contains an isometric harbor scene with a wooden dock connected to land and boats on either side.
This illustration shows a harbor drawn on isometric tiles, with a main dock running from the shore into the water and boats beside it.
isometric_harbor_open_water_canvas: The image shows an isometric harbor with a shoreline, blue water tiles, a connected wooden main dock, and boats in open water.
The scene shows a pixel-art isometric harbor with land at the shore, a wooden dock, and boats floating in the water.
The picture shows an isometric harbor scene where boats are placed in open water near a shoreline and dock.
The canvas contains an isometric harbor with shoreline tiles, water tiles, a wooden pier, and boats floating on the water.
This illustration shows a tiled isometric harbor with a visible shore edge, a dock, and boats floating on the water.

left_side_boat_count: How many boats are docked on the image-left side of the main dock?
Count the boats moored along the image-left side of the main dock.
What is the number of boats touching the image-left side of the main dock?
How many boats are tied to the left side of the main dock in the image?
Count only the boats on the image-left side of the wooden main dock.
right_side_boat_count: How many boats are docked on the image-right side of the main dock?
Count the boats moored along the image-right side of the main dock.
What is the number of boats touching the image-right side of the main dock?
How many boats are tied to the right side of the main dock in the image?
Count only the boats on the image-right side of the wooden main dock.
moored_boat_count: How many boats are tied along the main dock?
Count the boats moored beside the wooden main dock.
What is the number of boats tied to the main dock?
How many boats are docked along the wooden pier?
Count only the boats attached to the main dock.
open_water_boat_count: How many boats are in open water, not tied to the dock?
Count the boats floating away from the main dock.
What is the number of boats that are not attached to the dock?
How many boats are in the water away from the wooden pier?
Count only the boats in open water that are not tied along the main dock.
toward_shoreline_boat_count: How many boats are facing toward the shoreline?
Count the boats whose bows point toward the shore.
What is the number of boats facing the land edge?
How many boats point toward the shoreline?
Count only the boats headed toward the shore.
away_from_shoreline_boat_count: How many boats are facing away from the shoreline?
Count the boats whose bows point away from the shore.
What is the number of boats facing away from the land edge?
How many boats point away from the shoreline?
Count only the boats headed away from the shore.
shoreline_nearest_boat: Which lettered boat is closest to the shoreline?
Choose the letter of the boat nearest to the shore.
Which labeled boat has the smallest distance to the shoreline?
Select the letter for the boat closest to the land edge.
Which boat label marks the open-water boat nearest the shore?

code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_boat_side_count: set "answer" to the number of boats docked on the {target_side_label} of the main dock
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_boat_side_count: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around each counted boat; use [] when the count is 0
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_boat_mooring_status_coun: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around each counted boat; use [] when the count is 0
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_boat_heading_status_count: set "answer" to the number of boats facing {target_heading_label}
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_boat_heading_status_coun: set "annotation" to a list of [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding boxes around each counted boat
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_shoreline_nearest_boat_label: set "answer" to the selected boat letter
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_shoreline_nearest_boat_l: set "annotation" to [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel bounding box around the selected boat
